_: Concerns for the knowledge assistant. Single concern: engagement. Fires when a human speaks.

_._: Engagement. A human has spoken. Check your identity block for the list of available knowledge blocks. Use bsp tool calls to fetch relevant content from the right block, then answer. Write your full response in the note field of your output.

3._: Compile engagement context — identity and shell state only. Knowledge blocks accessed via bsp tool calls.

_._: Identity — who this entity is, and the index of available knowledge blocks.
Purpose — what this entity exists to do.
